Not sure whether any customer code under Marti is still in use since ALIAGA is still using MTIST office to create customer code.  I've downloaded all the TR customer code from Allegro as attachment.

Could you assist to review and change the status to be inactive at your side ( you can sort out them by filtering the admin office)?  Any problem, please let us know. Thanks!

answer.text:
Dear Moham,


After checking your case, I have to clarify following.


1.	
	When you delete OFT/Surcharge via FCA, please delete the row directly. Please do not change the amount to be '0'. Otherwise, Trade will be unable to approve/reject it.






2.	
	In case you fail to proceed,  please ask to trade to unlock the booking.




       3. In case the VVD must be unlock also, please ask Trade to unlock the booking and you have to amend the freight detial within 2 hours after Marine team unlock the VVD.
 
In summary, please coordinate with Marine team and Trade within two hours and complete the amendment.Thanks!


Joanne Ding / 丁佳莹

Digital & IT Department

Mobile: +86-13417033072

E-mail: joanneding@culines.com <mail

Web: www.cul

answer.text:
Dear Marah,

For the MIV invoice, you just need to update the Actual Customer in MIV.

If the Shipper Customer in the booking needs to be changed, a C/N is required since DPY = Y, but it won’t affect the invoice.





Kind regards,

 

Kieran Ji / 季胤喆

System Engineer

Digital & IT Department

Mobile: +86-17701880547 <tel:+14707390496>
